tweets.text: A strong real estate investment strategy means setting precise financial benchmarks. As you analyze underperforming assets this weekend, look closely at rising emergency repair costs.  Transitioning to predictive maintenance tech can reduce operational costs by 20-30%.

tweets.text:
Weekend reflection for real estate leaders: The technology you deploy is only as effective as your team’s willingness to adopt it.

Upskilling your property management staff to work alongside advanced software tools is just as critical as the software investment itself.
